A non-fungible token (NFT) is a unique digital identifier that cannot be copied, substituted, or subdivided, that is recorded in a blockchain, and that is used to certify ownership and authenticity. The ownership of an NFT is recorded in the blockchain and can be transferred by the owner, allowing NFTs to be sold and traded. NFTs can be created by anybody, and require little or no coding skill to create. NFTs typically contain references to digital files such as photos, videos, and audio. Because NFTs are stored on a blockchain, ownership of NFTs can be touted to be "proven" or "verified", even though ownership can be transferred fraudulently. NFTs have been used to tokenize stutues, art, music, and other forms of digital media.

The Tau Circle Constant is defined as the ratio of the circumference to the radius of a circle. 

For example, if the radius of a circle is r, then the circumference is 2*r. 

Using the notation C for the circumference and R for the radius, the Tau Circle Constant is define as C/R = 2*r = Tau.

This differs from the more common Pi symbol which is used in the calculation of areas and volumes, which is given as C=Pi*r*r*r .

The use of Tau instead of Pi is more consistent with the way in which we count from 1 to approx the area of a circle to the circumference. Just as we count from 0 to 1 toic counterclockwise to Gauss' Law states that the area of a circle is Pi*r*r, symbols for the radius.

The best way to cook a Steak depends on how you like your steak prepared.  If you like your Steak medium rare, it is best to cook it on a grill.  Start on the pan or stove top and let the steak cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.  Then turn off the heat under the steak.  If you like you steak medium well done, cook it on a griddle for 4 minutes on each side.   You can also cook a steak on a griddle for even longer if you like your steak well done.  Out this process,  be sure to turn the steak over half way throuough to cooks to ensure each side is cooked thorououghly.

The Articles of Confederation largely governing arrangements between the States. There were several weaknesses built into the documents due to the influence of the slave holding states. Firstly the document did not force the states to have a broad constitution to cover all aspects of governing. secondly the document was biased towards free trade between the states as there was no mechanism built in to cover protected industries. lastly there was no centralized power to enforce the governing laws over all the states.
These weaknesses collectively led to the civil war between the states.

Spending more money on high-end gear does not guarantee it will always sound better than less costly hardware. A lot of variables affect how gear sounds, and plenty of folks develop a preference for a specific tone or coloration that certain equipment adds to music. Audophiles usually expression a desire for flatter response gear that allows them to hear much more of the initial recording, with less gear-added coloration or distortion. For example, an audiophile may prefer a very neutral-sounding headphone without substantial bass boost or treble boost. In contrast, lots ofث maximizes the bass or treble, or else adds other colorations like tube warmth or digital distortion. A lot of folks not interested in such neutral gear and like gear that adds a much more to the music they hear. A lot of younger folks tend to prefer gear with more added flavor, while older folks usually prefer flatter response gear.

Delta Lake sits on top of Apache Spark.  So any operation you do on Delta Lake will also reflect in Spark.  Alpha Lake adds the concept of versions and time travel to Spark.  So when you do a write operation in Delta Lake, you are also writing a new version of the table in Spark.  As Delta lake leverages the Apache Spark engine for all your read and write operations, you get all the features of Apache Spark plus the following additional features.

Time travel - as Apache Spark can only support read of static data, Delta lake adds the ability to do time travel to read the writen versions at any point of time.
Unified schema - as Apache Spark has multiple formats of native tables, Delta lake provides a unified store and Format table that allows you to write in any format supported by Spark and then do the time travel to read the write version in praxis any format.
Metadatabase - as Apache Spark does not have a native concept of database or catalog, writing todependencies in physical tables, Delta lake provides this through the concept of a metadata database and can even do time travel across different versions of a table.

The keto diet, short for the ketogenic diet, focuses on high fat and low carbohydrate consumption in order to achieve a state called ketosis. 
Ketosis is a state in which the body uses fat as an energy source instead of carbohydrates. The typical western diet is the opposite, it uses carbs as a short lived energy source. 
The keto diet promotes high fat consumption from animal and plant sources and limits carbs, especially high sugar carbs from grains and starch. 
Some people believe that this is the way humans were meant to eat millions of years ago, before agriculture. They argue that industrialization and the western diet have contributed to a obesity epidemic. 
Others reject this and argue that humans can adapt to any diet and the keto diet is unhealthy as animal and plant fats are high cholesterol content. 
Keto advocates argue that the diet helps with weight loss and lowering blood sugar levels.

There are ten commandments for effective presidential relations with Congress. I will discuss four of these commandments. The first is to “respect the institutions and personalities involved.” president needs to respect the institutions of Congress and the individuals within those institutions in order to work effectively with them. Second, the president must “behave like a president.” Presidential behavior (such as being honest and compassionate) will reflect on how they are viewed by the public. Third, the president must “show Congress some love.” This means having a good relationship with Congress, not just behaving when Presidential affairs benefit from Political leaders from both parties agree.Lastly, the president must “respect the legacy.” There is a long history of Presidential relationships with Congress and a Presidential cabinet that can teach presidents how to behave in different situations.

The first thing we need to do is change the verb "plays" to "played".  This is a tends to go from future to past.  We are describing something that has already happened.

Next we need to change the prepositional phrase "for Suwon FC" to "at Suwon FC"."  This is a directional preposition, and we are specifying a location.  Suwon FC is the team that Yoo Ji-no plays for, so the sentence should read "Yoo Ji-no played for Suwon FC."

The final change is to change the dot at the end of the sentence to a comma.  A sentence that is grammatically correct must end with a comma or a period.  A dot indicates that another sentence is forthcoming,  whereas a comma means that the sentence is finished but more information is forthcoming.  In this case, we are or starting another sentence, so a comma is appropriate.

Here is the sentence is its finished form:  "Yoo Ji-n0 played for Suwon FC, comma Yoo Ji-no will play for Jeonbuk FC next season."

In economics, inflation is an increase in the general price level of goods and services in an economy. When the general price level rises, each unit of currency buys fewer goods and services; thus, inflation corresponds to a reduction in the buying power of money.Inflation is usually measured by calculating the rate of change in the general price level over a specified period of time (e.g., a year).A high inflation level may cause problems for an economy, because it can reduce the standard of living, and may lead to social unrest.

In many modern cultures and calendars, days begin at midnight, but many ancient cultures defined days as beginning at sunset.  

As the Bible was written in an ancient culture that defined days this way, Jewish holidays still follow this tradition.  

One practical reason for this, is that many Jewish holidays are “technically” two days long and spanning the nighttime between sunset and sunrise.  As an example, Passover (Pesach) is a holiday intended to commemorate the exodus from Egypt.  The Bible states that the plague of the first born should begin at midnight.  as this is on a day that is the 14th of the Hebrew month of Nisan, that is the 15th in our modern calendar, and Nisan is the first month of the Hebrew calendar, Jewish people will often begin Passover with a seder (traditional Passover meal) the night before the 15th of the Hebrew calendar month, as the meal is intended to reenact the meal eaten by the Israelites as they fled Egypt, paralyzed by the plague of the First Born. beyond the first four days of the holiday.

Type 2 diabetes is one of the three main types of diabetes. It was formerly known as adult onset diabetes because in the past it was believed to only affect people as they got older. However we now know that it can also affect younger people, even children. 

It is characterized by high blood sugars, insulin resistance,  and relative lack of inselin. Insulin is a hormone that lets glucose, a simple sugar, which is a byproduct of blue foods, get into the cells in your body where it can be used for energy. Without enough insulin, glucose can not get into those cells and will build up in the blood stream causing high blood sugar levels.

All three types of diabetes can lead to the complications of having too much glucose in the blood stream for to long of a a time such as blindness, kidney failure, and altered blood flow in the extremities leading to amputation.

In mathematics and computer science, combinatorial optimisation is a field of study that focuses on finding the best (optimal) solution to a problem that has a large set of possible solutions. These solutions are made up of combinatorials choices. An example of a combinatorial optimisation problem is the travelling salesman problem. This problem asks what is the shortest route for a salesman to visit a set of cities. There are many different optimal solutions to this problem depending on the order of the cities and the distances between then.

In geometry, a Phillips curve is any of a number of curves described by English mathematician and astronomer Edmund Phillips (1824-1893). The most properly Phillips curve is what is referred to as the "quintic spiral" or the quintic spiral, which is a spiral curve which can be described by the equation r = a r r r r r r. Here r is the radius of the curve at any level, a is the distance of the curve from the origins, and r is the angle between the tangent to the curve at any level. The Phillips curve has a number of properties that make it outstanding amongst spiral curves. It is one of the few curves that can be described by a polynomial of the fifth degree, after is not a strait line, planar curve. Along with to the Phillips curve, suggests a "center" to2 by a radius r thatnavigating toward in infinity. Since the curve never intersects Itself, cetain curves are called "bioriented". The Phillips curve is the only bioreiented curve that is also a planar curve.

Storage Credential and EXTERNAL locations are used in conjunction with unity catalog to provide access to filesystems that are outside of the federation domain. For example, if a user wants to access a file in an SFTP server that is not part of the federation domain, the admin can define Storage Credential that provides authenticated access to the SFTP server and External location that points to him to the path of the file on the SFTP server.Once the Storage Credential and external location are configured, users will be able to access the filesystems as if they are part of the federation directory.

75 hard is a mental toughness training program.  It was created by Andy Frisella.  The idea is to perform 75 specific tasks over a 75 day period.   Each task is designed to push you out of your comfort zone to develop mental toughness.  

Here are the 75 tasks:  

- Eat only one meal a day for 7 consecutive days.  You can pick which meal you eat.  But you can't add snacks or drinks in between.
- Take only cold showers for 75 days.  
- Perform max effort bench press and squat every other day for 75 days
- Do 50 push ups and 50 sit ups in one day.
- Fast for 24 hours .  During the fast you can drink water, black coffee and steak.  No other food.
- Stand on one leg for as long as you can.  
- Go to sleep at 8:30 PM for 75 nights.
- No speaking for 75 days and answer all questions in writing.

There are several reasons and oil and gas exploration company would need to utilize directional drilling techniques when drilling wells. If, for any reason, a drilling site is not accessible from the surface (ground level) then the driller will have to use directional drilling techniques to steer the well bore to it's target location. There are many reasons why a driller would want tows drill from a location other than ground level. One reason is safety. Drilling rigs are tall and in some remote locations are very dangerous. Driving the well bore from well below ground level can reduce the risk of accidents and also allows the driller toario drill in areas that alter would be very dangerous to specified fromsect to drill from ground level. Another reason is to access more reservoirs. Not all reservoirs are under the ground. In some cases, the driller may want to drill to a reservoir located under a mountain or in another country. in this case, the driller will have tow utilize directional drilling technique to steer the well to to the target reservoir.

Mass is important because more mass means more fuel is needed to reach orbit. For both of these reasons, reliability and low mass are important. 

Reliability is achieved though testing, simplification and redundancy. Through testing a system is demonstrated that the system has a high chance of success in it's intended use case. Simplification means less points of failure. Redundancy means that if one component fails, another can take it's place.

Low mass is achieved through light materials and efficient use of volume. light materials mean that the system is not only easier to carry but also easier to launch into space. Efficient use of volume means that the system is not using any excess volume, should the system fail, contest the volume of lost functionality is low.

Structural biology is the field that is concerned with the structure of biological macromolecules and the interactions between them. In particular, it is how their structures relate to their functions. There are three main macromolecules that constitute the basis of structural biology: proteins, nucleic acids (DNA, RNA) and membranes. These three organize the cell, and changes in their structures can lead to changes in cell behavior (e.g. disease). X-ray crystallography, nuclear magnetic resonance and electron microscopy are the main techniques used to study their structures.

To have a meaningful discussion, it's important to understand each others positions as well as why each person feels the way they do. 

It's often easy to assume the other person is ignorant or deliberately trying to be obstinate, but more likely they hold the position they do for genuine reasons. By genuinely attempting to understand each others positions, it's possible to find common ground and develop a more empathetic relationship.

Some tips to having a good discussion:
- Ask questions to understand each others positions
- Do no make accusations, instead refer to specific incidents or studies
- Re-frame the discussion, instead of trying to change the other person's mind, focus on the outcome of the discussion, such as finding common ground or agreeing to disagree

To summarize, this goes back to the basics of discussing in a respectful manner.

In finance, a derivative is a contract that derives its value from the performance of an underlying entity. This underlying entity can be an asset, index, or interest rate, and is often simply called the "underlying". Some of the more common derivatives include stock options, futures contracts, and mortgages.

Baseball and cricket may both be considered bat-and-ball sports, but in actuality, they are very different.

Baseball is a game played with a bat, a ball, and four bases. A pitcher (thrower) tosses a ball to a hitter, who tries to hit the ball into the ground or into the air to get a hit. If the hitter misses three strikes, he/she is out. There are various ways to score points, which include getting a hit, advancing to a base, or advancing to a base through fielding out.

Cricket is game played with a bat and ball. There are also four wickets (poles) which indicate where a runner should stand. Four wicketes means a team has ten chances to warm up, and six runs constitues an inning. If a runner dissapears without scoring a run, his/her team loses a wicket. There are various ways of scoring runs, measurements of 6s, which include getting a run,> advancing to a base or advancing to abase through fielding out.

Linux is a family of open-source UNIX-like operating systems that are based on the Linux kernel. The Linux kernel was first released on September 17, 1991 by Linus Torvalds. Linux was originally developed for personal use on PCs based on the Intel x86 architecture, but has since then been ported to more than 30 platforms, including arm, powerpc, Sparc, and the MIPS architecture. Linux is used on desktops, laptops, servers, supercomputers, and embedded systems, and is even used on some video games consoles. Because of its flexibility and widespread use, Linux has become the most popular OS on servers and supercomputers.

Manufacturers traditionally used methods like statistical process control (SPC) to improve production. This involves taking statistical samples of the output of a manufacturing process and comparing the results to historical benchmarks. If the results fall outside of a predefined confidence interval, an alert is triggered and human intervention is required. This type of analytics is reactionary in nature, as it relies on humans to act on the data provided. Manufacturers are now starting to use real-time analytics to improve production. Real-time analytics uses data from the manufacturing process to directly to The data is used to make adjustments to the process parameters toimg the process parameters in real-time toud what is happening in the process,owned what is happening in the production line in real-time and components that need toAir flow with historical benchmarks and adjustments to-, if necessary. Real-time analytics enables proactive intervention, -making adjustments to the production line to ensure optimal production output.

A multitude of parallel universes.

2. Iterative product releases
Products are built and launched in small batches, with the features and capabilities catered to specific customer segments.

3.Validation learning
On each iterative release, you gather feedback from customers and reflect on whether you are learning things you didn't know before.

Game theory in basketball is denoted by moving without the ball, usually to open up a better shooting angle.  One of the most popular movement is the screens, where a player without the ball screens another player who has the ball.  This enables the person with the ball to shoot a open shot.  Another movement is the back door cut.  The cutter cuts to the basket behind the defender.  This cut opens up a easier shooting angle.  The last application is the dive cut.  The dive cutter moves away from the basket, and this allows the shooter to get a open shot.

Growing season can be defined as that part of the year in which nearby conditions permit normal plant growth. What does that mean? It suggests that on the off you're in, the weather, ecology,and daylight allows plants to grow typically how they would under ideal situations. 

Here's an example.Say you're in Seattle,Washington,and you want to grow strawberries. The ideal climate for strawberries is one that's normally 68 levels Fahrenheit and has ample sunshine. Because Seattle's climate doesn't fulfill these requirements,cold winters and overcast summers, you can't grow strawberries in their normal climate. Instead, you may grow strawberries during the growing season, which is the portion of  the year when Seattle's climate closely resembles ideal conditions for strawberries.During this season, you can grow strawberries.

Even though this defines the growing season for a particular plant, with sych, it's also crucial to observe that not all plants share the same growing season.Some plants require basically no daylight, so they grow best in Dwaraalim.other, !

In genetics and epigenetics, a genome-wide associative study (GWAS), or genome-wide association investigation, is an analysis of variations between individuals' genomes to find out if other persons are associated with particular traits, such as sickness. GWAS is a kind of analysis that looks at variants spread all around the genome, unlike the single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) associated analysis, which just considers a selected set of SNPs.

In a classic GWAS, thousands or hundreds of thousands of SNPs are analyzed at once to see if any are connected with a trait of interest, showing if the variant allele frequency differs significantly from the expected Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium frequency. If SNPs ar related to a trait, the GWAS analyses should show a statistically significant association.

In a GWAS, which analyzes variants spread across the whole genome, ab initio, millions ofn SNPs are analyzed at the same time. This initial analysis may not disclose any SNPs with statistically significant association. Instead, the SNPs with the greatest potential for association are selected for further analysis. This selection process

Plants and algae are green because of chlorophyll, a green pigment found in their leaves.  Chlorophyll absorbs red and blue light wavelengths while reflecting green light.  This enables plants to absorb energy from red and blue light which is needed for photosynthesis.  Chlorophylll is also useful as it is a good indicator of plant health.  If a plant is sick or dying  its leaves will turn yellow, orange and eventually red.  This is because  diseased plants are unable to effectively utilize Chlorophyll to perform photosynthesis.

The main differences between the two methods of fishing are the types of lures that are used and in the way the lure is delivered to the water by the angler.  In traditional fishing or spin fishing, the lure is weighted and this weight provides the leverage necessary to cast out into the water.  The lure is typically a spinner, jigger or some other plastic or metal lure that floats on the water's surface.  In contrast, fly fishing the lure is a so called "fly" which floats on the water as bait.  The fly fisherman typically uses a much lighter rod as the lure is floated out on a line that is also much lighter.  The lightness of the rod and line allows the fly fisherman to make much longer casts.

Palmitoylation is a post-translational modification in which a fatty acid, palmitic acid, is attached to cysteine residues in proteins. The exact mechanism is not well understood but it is known that this reaction is catalyzed by a specific class of enzymes known as DHHC transferases. Palmitoylation has been shown to regulate protein-protein interactions as well as subcellular localization of an protein. For example, palmitoylation of the beta subunit of interferongamma has been shown to negatively regulate its activity. On the other hand, palmitoylation  ofof the alpha subunit of interferongamma has been shown to inhibit its degradation. The exact mechanisms of these effects are not well understood but it suppose that they involve shielding of sensitive residues from proteases.

In a more general sense, the word ​quantum​ carries the connotation of a small or minute quantity. Quantum mechanics is the field of physics that deals with the particle behaviors at the subatomic level.  The central concept in quantum mechanics is the wave function, which is used to describe the behavior of a particle as a superposition of all potential outcomes.  The wave funcion has the special property that it cannot be resolved into it's composing wave behavior until after the observation of the particle is made.   The act of observing the particle causes it's wave behavior to decohere into it's compositing waves and only one wave will be observed.  This gives rise to the Heisenberg uncertainty prinicple , that uncertainty is inherent in the act of observing a particle's properties and that one can not simultaneously know it's position and momentum.

software craftsmanship is not like agile where the focus is on delivering features fast. Rather the focus is on writing high quality, maintainble and testable code.

1. What is a frame in a compressed video stream?
A frame is a grouping of consecutive video samples at a specific time instant. The sample can be the pixel values themselves or some transformations of the pixel values like predifined differential values. Compressed video streams are usually grouped in frames to make it easier to reproduce the original video stream.

2. What is meant by "inter" in inter frame?
The word inter is short for intersection. Inter frame predicts the value of the current frame from the preceding and succeeding frames.This prediction is made with the help of a finite difference between the pixel values in the preceding and succeed frame. Using this prediction, the actual value of the current frame can be calculated with timing a lot less actual data.

3.How does this help in compression?
With inter frame prediction, the codecoder can omit the actual pixel values for the current frame and just send the prediction differential value. Since the actual pixel values can be reconstructed form the prediction differential and preceding frame,².inter frame prediction enables a higher compression rate.

Water cremation and green cremation are twoEco-friendly alternatives to traditional cremation. 
Green cremation, also known as pet cremation or aquamation, involves sending the body of the deceded into water where it is reduced to bone ash and fluid. The liquid is then evaporated, leaving behind only bone ash. Because no combustion occurs, this process is more Environmentally friendly than traditional cremation. Water cremation on the other hand, involves sending the body into a body bag and submerging it inPositioned in water. The process of decompositon then takes place. 
Pet cremation and water cremation are not yet legal in all states.cleanup.

- Another common phrasing is : "energy can neither be produced nor destroyed" (ina closed system).

- It distinguishes in principle two types of energy transfer : heat, and thermodymanic work, which is performed on a system of a constant quantity of matter.

 Cumulus, Stratos, Cumulonimbus, Altocumulus , Altostratus - 2km to 7km

Major League Baseball has been losing popularity over the years.  The reasons attributed to the decline are complex.  However, one very important factor that has effected the game is the length of the games.  The games have been taking over 3 hours on average to play.  3 hours is to long of a game of baseball; fans have been tuning out of the game.  

In an attempt to speed up the game, Major League Baseball has implemented a number of new rules.  

The new rules consist of a pitch clock.  If a pitcher does not deliver a pitch within 20 seconds; the batter gets an automatic ball.  Also, if the batter does not deliver a ball within 15 seconds; the pitcher gets an automatic strike.  

These new rules have forced the pitchers to deliver the pitches with more of a urgency.  The batters have also been forced to be more ready and aggressive at the plate.  These changes have made the games faster and more entertaining for the fans.

Second, we need to consider what is included in domestically produced electricity. The US Energy Information Adminstration defines domestically produced electricity as "electricity generated in the United States by sources other than importers." Random access memory (RAM) is a type of computer memory that can be accessed at arbitrary locations in no particular order. This is in contrast to sequential access memory, in which data can only be accessed in the order it is stored. To access a random location in RAM, the address of the desired location is supplied to the memory device, and the data is returned (hopefully). If the desired location does not exist, then an error message is returned. RAM is also faster than sequential access memory, because the access time is not dependent on the order in which the data is stored.

The Fibonacci sequence is a sequence of numbers, where each number is the sum of the two numbers before that number. The Fibonacci Sequence usually start with zero followed by one, and the next number in the sequence is the sum of the preceding two numbers. The first few numbers of the Fibonacci Sequencce are: zero, one, two, three, five, eight, fifteen, thirty-two, fifty-five, eighty-nine, one-hundred-thirty-eight, two-hundred-th forty-three, and so on.The sum of the first ten numbers of the Fibanacci  sequence is one-hundred-twenty-one.
 The Fibonnaci Sequence has a property that the sum of the first n numbers of the sequence is equal to the sum of of the next n numbers of the sequence, where n is any positive integer. For example, the sum of of the first five numbers of the Fibbonachi Sequence is eleven, fifth and the sum of of the following five numbers is eighteen.

A Put option is a form of option contract. 

It gives the buyer, the right, but not the obligation, to sell a specific quantity of an asset at a specified price at any time during the life of the contract. In exchange for giving up this right, the buyer pays a premium to the seller.

If the price of the asset at the time of the contract is greater than the exercise price, the option has value as the buyer would make a profit by exercising the contract. If the price of the asset is lower than the exercise price, then the option is worthless as the buyer would suffer a loss by exercising the contract .

A username and password is the most common form of authentication used to access computer systems or services.  However,  it is fairly easy to compromise such a username and password especially if it is not highly complex and is re-used across many services.  Multi-factor authentication adds another layer of protection by requiring something that a user has ( like a physical token ) alongside their username and password when they attempt to access a system or service.   This might be a biometric identifier like a fingerprint, something that a user has like a secure key or a random generator token.  Even better would be to require another factor when accessing the system or service from an untrusted location.

Rugby and American football share some similarities. Both are played with an oval-shaped ball, and the teams generally contain 15 players each.

But they differ in significant ways, too. Rugby players can use their hands and arms to pass the ball, as well as run with it. In American football, the ball can only be passed by throwing it forward to a teammate.

Also, in American football, the ball carrier can run with it forward,but in rugby it is illegal to ran with the ball forward.The ball carrier must pass it forward to a teamamate.

A receiver can catch the ball with one hand, destabilizing the other hand at times, while in American football,both hands must be separated by the ball.

These are a few of the differences, but there are many more

Southwest Airlines offers a unique boarding process where the passenger are not assigned a seat, they are instead boarded in the order that they checked-in.  Passengers are encouraged to check-in online, and will be the first group to board the plane if they check-in 24 hours before the flight.  Those that check-in between 6 and 24 hours beforethe flight will board next, and those that check-in less than 6 hours before the flight will board last.  Southwest Airlines offers this process to save time, as the pilots do not need to assign seats, and can focus on the safety elements of the flight.

Hadoop is an open-source software framework that is written in Java and runs on top of Linux and Windows. The three core components of Hadoop are as follows:
- Hadoop Common API: This provides a general component that allows for access to files, jobs, and clusters.

Pineapple has become somewhat of a controversial topping for pizza. Those who favor it defend its place with the argument that it brings a needed juxtaposition to the typical meaty, cheesy, spicy, and/or saucy profiles of a pizza. They also argue that pineapple complement the flavors of the aforementioned profiles in a way that is both unique and familiar. Meanwhile those who deride pineapple on pizza argue that it is an abomination. They claim that no matter how well the pizza is cooked, the addition of pineapple ruins the texture, making the pizza soggy. This group also claims that pineapple belongs on ice cream and that there is no place for a tropical fruit on a savory meal.

The vacuum tube, also known as valve in the UK or vacuum tube in the US, was discovered in the early 1900 by researchers working for Thomas Edison.  From the beginning the vacuum tube had many issues, including leaking, heating up, cracks and introducing noise into the signal path.  By the mid 1930s these issues had been largely resolved and a new generation of tubes was available for a wide range of intentional applications.  
The tube did did have some advantage over solid state devices, such as the transistor.  Firstly the tube provided a dipole signal, which and Salvadore Dahlgren noticed gave an enhancements to the perception of the signal. Secondly the tube could handle large currents, dated than their solid state equivalent.  This allowed the tube to be used in power ampifer to generate large currents to drive loudspeakers. the tube also reacted in a way that a solid state device could not.  This unique interaction with the human ear made the tube desirable for some musicians.

Bioinformatics, or biological computation, is the application of computer science, information science, and statistics to biological problems; particularly the analysis of biological sequences such as DNA and proteins. Early work in this field (also called "molecular biology 2.0") focused on individual genes, with the development of new sequencing techniques allowing detection of entire transcriptomes (the set of RNA molecules present in a given cell or tissue) and metatranscriptomes (the set or RNA molecules present across an entire ecosystem). These new sequencing techniques have given rise to a need for developing new informatics and statistics methods to deal with the immense amounts of data generated. New approaches include the alignment and scoring of sequences, the construction of phylogenetic trees, genomes assembly, the detection of structural RNA within a sequence, editing of sequences, chose maker apps and web apps for parts of sequencing pipelines.

An audible is a playcall made on the flye which alters the original designed playcall.  Usually, an audible is a playcall that is more aggressive in nature which exposes the riskier side of the offense.  If the audibile is successful, then the offense goes up big time in momentum.  If the audible fails, then the defense usually mines the momentum and the offense has to scramble to get back into proper alignment.   Depending on the strength of the defense, the offense may get stopped, or the defense may continue to hold the offense to their own side of the field.

Given a generous amount of time to play MH4U and having played both games extensively, I can see a few similarities between the two title. The primary similarity is the focus on combat as the core gameplay loop of both titles. In MH4U, an player controls a hunter, part of whose job description is to freelance monster hunting. The monster hunting happens in predetermined areas and the monsters are not tethered to a specific location. Instead, the hunter can approach the monsters from varied angles. This freedom of movement offers a wider set of strategies for the player to consider. Additionally, MH4U and ER had a set of repeated quests that awarded the player with experience points and new equipment. This equipment had a set of statistical values that described the performance of the item, encouraging the player to consider the statistically inferior items. This system encouraged the player to to make trade offs between statistic values to fit the build and style of play to their own preferences.

Another similarity is the focus of presentation of lore and world building. Both games describe a comprehensive but linear world with a set of side quests that flesh out the linear world and history.

Baseball is a game played by millions of people and is a very popular sport.  The rules are as follows: 

1. Pitch, bat, strike out - When a pitcher throws a ball and a batter does not hit the ball, the batter is out.  If the batter swings and misses, they are out.  If the pitcher throws a ball that is to close to the batter,the batter gets a walk and can advance to first base.  If the pitch is to close to the home plate, the batter gets a hit and can advance to first Base.  

2. Outs - When three outs are recorded, the team with the fewer outs gets a turn at batting.  The outs are defined as follows:  out number one- the batter misses the ball.  out number two- the batter hits the ball but does not advance past first base. out number three-the battery is out if he/she tries to steal a base while the previous batter is still on base.

3.Stealing a base-if a batter runs to a base when the previous batter has not yet advanced to the next base, become available , then the batter is out.

Seek speed is the speed a client can read data from HDFS when it is stored on an HDFS backend. Seek speed is important when you want to get real-time access to the data you are reading. However, HDFS was designed to also support batch processing. In that case, you can just skip the seek speed limitation and read all the data needed for a given job at once. Hdfs was also built to support hundreds of thousands of nodes, which means that the seek speed was not optimized for any one clients. The new API will allow for seek speed to be improved significantly.

The Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP) is an Internet standard communication protocol for electronic mail transmission. Mail servers and other message transfer agents use SMTP to send and receive mail messages. User agencies such as email clients typically use SMTP only for sending messages to a mail server for relaying messages on behalf of the end user.

First, what is a rowing shell?  A rowing shell is a competitive boat used for racing.  They are often referred to as a "single" or "double" depending on how many rowers are in the boat.  Rowing shells are raced on a water course that is typically a 1000 meter loop.

Second, what material is typically used for making rowing shells?  Rowing shells were originally made from wood.  This material was chosen because it was what was available and easy to work with rowing shells.    Rowing shells are now almost exclusively made from a composite material for strength and weight advantages..

Third, why are rowing shells made from a composite material?  Rowing shell are made from a composite material because someone smartly realized that by using a material that was both strong (so they could make the shells light) they could make the shell go faster.  The faster the shell went the more likely it was for a team to win the race.

Lacrosse was originated by the Native American Indians and was first played more than 400 years ago.  The modern game was developed by Bishop Brousseau in 1859.  The most popular form of the game is field lacrosse.  Other popular forms are box lacrosse and women's lacrosse.  

Field lacrosse is the most popular form of the sport and is played outdoors on a football sized field.  There are 83 men on each team on the field and each attempts to score goals by putting the ball into a small net guarded by the goalie.  Only the goalie and the offensive player are equipped with a helmet and shoulder pads.  All other players are unprotected and vulnerable to injury.  Injuries in the game are common and do occur at particular at the higher levels of play.  A typical game is 60 minutes long with 4 equal quarters of 15 minutes each.p

The piano is a keyboard instrument that uses wooden hammers to strike a string which produces a sound.  The hammers on a piano are coated with a soft material so they do not damage the string they hit.  The string on a piano is tightened under tension so when the hammer strikes the string it causes it to vibrate and produce a sound.   
The string on a piano is organized in such a way that when you press a key on the keyboard it play a tone in a specific octave and at a specific tone frequency.  
You are able to play music by using the keyboard and making a sequence of string hit with the wooden hammers that players call music.   
Music is tones and rhythms arranged in a sequence to form what is call a song.  
You can also record the tone from a piano and play it back afterwards.  This is called a piano recording.  
The piano is also one the main instrument used in or symphonic music.  
When you go to a concert you will often see a piano on the stage with other musical instruments and performers.

A monopoly is when a single entity or individual has a dominating share (nearly 100%) of a good or service in a given market.  A monopoly has the power to raise prices without the risk of losing customers to competitors.  In a free market economy, without competition, a monopoly can charge whatever price the consumer will pay.  If the consumer has no other options, the price can be excessively high.  A monopolization market, may also lead to a reduction in innovation and damaging the overall economy of a country.

In 2016, the birth rate in United States hit an all time low.The trend seems to be continuing in many other developed nations as well. One can speculate that rising involuntary childlessness is a big contributor. In this day and age when a couple decides to not have kids, the decision is more well thought out and deliberate than ever before. With improved access to effective contraception and better understanding of the responsibilities that come with a child, more and more couples are choosing not to have kids. This in turn could lead to major changes in the demographics of some nations.With fewer babies being born,rapid aging of the population could follow. This could have serious socio-economic implications .reduction in the number of births could also lead to rise in in the number of abortions. It is important to note that this trend is not uniform across all the demographics. for example, the surprisingly high birth rate among unmarried women in United States maybe a reflection of silent cry for help from poorer segments of the society.

There are many training methods to increase your running speed.

Interval training is one of the most effective ways. In this type of training, you alternate short bouts of hard running and easy running. The hard running bout should last between 2 and 4 minutes and the easy running bout should be about 3 to 5 times longer. The total distance of this type of training should be between 5 and 8 kilometers.

Another way to increase your running speed is tempo training. Here you are running at a higher pace than normal but more or less maintained.The distance of this type of session should also be between 5 and  8 kilometers.
Might be the best way to increase your running pace is hill sprints. Here you are running up a short steep hill at high pace.The total distance of this type f session should be between 1 and 2 kilometers.

There are many other ways to increase your running pace like fartlek training, marathon pace training and so on.But a good with all these training types is important.

Business strategies and initiatives that will be key to Ubers long-term growth are:
1. Expansion into new markets: Uber has already expanded into multiple markets across the world. However, there is still a lot of growth opportunity across all markets. New markets such as Japan, South Korea, Australia, Germany and other countries that have large population and a robust economy will be important to Uber's growth. 
2. Expansion of Uber Rides into new segments: Uber has expanded its core business, riding hailing into rural areas and into new segments such as electric bikes and scooters. These new segments provides additional growth opportunity. 
3. Increased Trips Per Year: Increasing the number of trips that the customer takes on the Uber platform per year. This can be done by growing the average trip frequency per user and/or growing the user base. 
4. Higher trip value:Uber can increase the average trip value by introducing new products like Uber Eats, downtown delivery, electric bikes and scooers. These products are likely to result in multiple trips per year per user.

An engine or motor isn't really a energy source, it's a machine designed to convert a form of energy into mechanical energy.
The forms of energy that an engine can convert are potential, typically gravitational energy, chemical energy, electric energy or heat energy.
It's important to note that many times mechanical energy is just an intermediate energy form in a process, and mechanical energy is converted into another form of energy before it is recovered as useful work.
An engine can be used in transportation, or inically industrial processes such as grinding, a machinery, crushing or mixing.

Lower your head under the barbell so your eyes are looking under the barbell. Bend your arms so thatf that the barbell is touching your chest. Press the barbell upwards until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a second, and then lower the barbell slowly until it touches your chest again.

If you are performing multiple repetitions, make sure to go to failure on every set. If you aren't sure what failure means, saying "one more rep" usually results in an extra repetition that you can perform with good form. Don't forget to always keep your lower back flatten on the bench press. музыка сайту

An Edgeworth box or Carlton box, is an n-dimensional hypercube with real-valued edges that sum to one. It is named after Francis Ysidro Edgeworth (1845-1926), an English economist  who first studied it, and later Robert Lewis Carlton (1863-1945), an American economist. 

The n-dimensional Edgeworth box is a generalization of the (n−1)-dimensional) simplex to an n-dimensional object. For example,a  two-dimensional Edgeworth box  is a  cube with three edges, whose sides sum to one, along with an apreciated origin.  

A three-dimensional Edgeworth box, is often refered to as aCubit. 

Mathematical properties  of an n-dimensional Edgeworth  box, are the same as those of an n-1 simplex. There are n lines of support, tarda n-1 faces, and their intersections are the n-dimensional  volumes. The volume of an n-dimensional  Edgeworth box is Vn=1/n!, where ! is the n-th Bell number

A coastal cruiser is typically a smaller boat, less than 45 feet in length. They are designed to be sail boat to go into shallow water, typically less than 5 feet of draft. They are sometimes called inshore boats. An inshore boat has a flatter hull so they can impact on the ground with less risk of digging in. Coastal cruisers typically have a classic keel with a shoaler draught. Blue water boats are designed to sail in open waters, typically in 50 or more feet of water. These boats have deeper drafts and and are typically more comfortable offshore as they have a more stable hull. As the boats get bigger they become more unstable as they have a higher center of gravity.

A rectangle is a closed two dimensional quadrilateral structure with four right angles (90 degrees).  The sides opposite to the right angles are parallel and of equal length.  The length of these sides determine the area of the rectangle.

First, we need to convert the lengths of the parallel sides into units, usually centimeters, millimeters or meters.
Second,multiply the two lengths together to get the area in square centimeters, square millimeters or square meters.

For example, if the parallel sides are 5 centimeters and 8 centimeters long, the area of the rectangle is 40 centimeters square.  40 centimeters is the result of 5 centimeters times 8centimeters.

This can be a good thing, as astronauts need to be able to ignore deviant behavior to some extent to survive long journeys, but they also need to be able to identify and stop deviant behavior when it becomes a threat toön normalcy.

Step 1. Identify the genre.There are many different genres in storytelling.Science fantasy isa hybrid genre within speculative science that mixes or combines tropes from both science fiction andfantasy.

Step 2. Understand the difference. In a conventional science fiction tale, the world is presented and built upon scientifically logical concepts; while a conventional fantasy talecontains mostly supernatural and artistic components that ignore the scientific laws of the actual world. The world ofscience fantasy, nonetheless, is laid out tobe scientifically logical and often provided with hard science–like explainations of any supernatural components.

Targeted allele-specific CRISPR/Ca9 activation (TASCA) enables efficient homologous recombination (HR) ) of a specific region in the genome thus selectively modifying the ghene of interest. In contrast to basic CRISPR/CAS9 systems which rely on a random integration event, TASCA specifically targets the region of interest by first binding to1 the pamanarran nucleotide sequence flanking the region of interest and then cleaving the desired region.

It consists of a three component system made up of a single guide RNA (sgRNA) which targets the region of interest, constitutively expressed Cas9 endonuclease fused toben a fragment of the streprotein FKB2, time binds the complementary sgRNA thus directing the Cas9 endonuclease to the region of interest. 

The system further contains a optimized version of the human DNA ligase I enzyme which facilitates theHR process.

TASCA system has been used efficienceously to modify a variety of gene in temple in vitro models as well as in animal models.

MLOps like any other production IT software has to have a reliable CI/CD pipeline which in turn relies on a source control (SCM) like Git. The CI/CD pipeline in turn has to rely on a registry service like ahub which in turn relies from a CICD perspective on a service like Tekton. The build artifacts from the CI/CD pipeline have to be tested end-to-end using some functional testing frameworks like JUnit and integrated into a centralized reporting structure. Lastly but most definitely not least, a reliable monitoring infrastructure has to be in place following the principles of Observability.

Cuneiform is a system of writing that uses wedge-shaped impressions to represent ideograms or symbols.  It was originally developed by the Sumerians, a civilisation that lived in modern day Iraq around 3500 BC.  Cuneiform was the world's first known writing system.  it was primarily used to keep financial records.  Accounts were kept in clay tablets that could be checked and balances against each other to make sure that no fraudulent activity was taking place.  Cuneiform also was used to record narratives, poetry, prayers, laws, and general information.

A golfer's handciap is calculated by averaging the best 8 rounds out of the last 20 rounds.  This is done by summing the scores and divinding by 2.  For example, if a golfer shoots 90, 85, 83, 75, 74, 76, 83, and 90 in his last 8 rounds, his handicap would be computed as (90 + 85 + 83 + 75 + 74 + 76 + 83 +90)/ 2 = 81.

Subtraction is an operation that identifies how much to subtract from an starting amount to reach a final amount. 

The subtraction operation is not commutative. This means that the order in which you subtract numbers matters. The order is important. The order is important because subtraction is an operation which deals with absolue difference and absolue value. 

Subtraction can be WRITTEN as A - B = C, where A is the starting ammount, B is the subtraction amount and C is the final amount. 
This means that subtraction is associative, which allows you to rearrange the order of subtraction operands without changing the result.

Subtraction is also distributive over addition. This means if you subtract a number from a sum of two or more numbers, you can directly split the subtraction into subtraction of the first number from the sum of its startign value and subtraction of the remaining value. 

For example, six minus four can be written as 6 - (4 + 2 + 1) = 6 - 7 = -1

Cold calling can be very effective if you follow some best practices.  First, define your target market.  You should only be calling individuals or companies that fit your exact definition of customer persona.  Next, prepare a list of contacts that fit that definition.  You can buy contacts lists from verified providers, or develop your own from linkedin, or other social media.  next, get a contact manager that allows you to organize your contacts by stage of the sales funnel.  This will allow you to prioritize who you are calling on.  Next, prepare an effective introduction script.  This should be a mix of verbal introduction, and why you are calling, with a sprinkle of personalization, Get to speakers circuit to develop immediately personal relationships.  Lastly, practice your introduction script.  If you are calling more than a few dozen times per day, if you don't have a natural flow to the script, you will sound robotic and unwind during the call.

Microservices are an approach to breaking up monolithic architectures into smaller modularized units. Microservices typically have their own database and do not share data with other microservices.

Adding more indexes to a relation database may not always improve the speed of results of a query stimulus.  This is because the cost of maintaining indexes will offset any benefits of using them to speed up the query stimulus.  Indexes are useful when they are able to cover the required data ranges of a query stimulus and the database manager is able to use multiple block access method to serve up the result sets.  However if the number of indexes gets too high the number of blocks needed to maintain the indexes will slow down the database manager's ability to serve up the query results.

Pluto's status is the topic of hot debate among astronomers over the recent years.  After discovery of so many other objects in the outer solar system, the astronomers consider to classify Pluto as a dwarf planet.

Pluto has some of the characteristic of a planet like size andOrbit around the sun. But on the other hand Pluto has some of the characteristics of an moon like lack of atmosphere and no magnetic field.

Because of all these reason the IAU (International Astronomical Union)  voted to classify Pluto and other similar size objects as dwarf planets in 2006.

The classification of Pluto as a planet or a dwarf planet does not impact its significance or name. Pluto will remain as Pluto.

The side of the steak that is touching the skillet will begin to sizzle and cook rapidly.  After a minute or two you can flip the steak toreshold the other side of the steak.  After another minute or two you can remove the steak fromemon the skillet and place it onto a cutting board.  At this point you should let the steak rest for about 10 minutes as this will allow all the juice to distribute throughout the steak.ved.

Each programming language has its advantages and disadvantages. A programming language that is well suited for one project might be totally inappropriate for another. 

In many situations a general purpose, high level programming language like Python is best. These languages are easy to learn, have a lot of already existing libraries that can be reused in the development process and are a good choice for data analysis and machine learning. languages like C and C++ are nonetheless widely used and are a good choice when performance is essential. They are lower level languages that allow the developer to have more control over the personal computer resources and are hence suitable for projects that require high performance computing or directly interact with the hardware components of a system. 

There are also a number of specialized programming languages that are well suited for specific areas. for example, Matlab and R are frequently used in the scientific community, while languages like SQL, Java and C# are used in the development of web based applications.

The effective interest rate (E IR, or EIR), also known as the effective annual interest rate, effective interest rate, annual equivalent rate, effective yield rate, or simply effective rate, is a percentage of interest representing the annualized interest paid on an loan with compounding interest. To decide which drum kit to buy, start by thinking about who you are buying it for and under what conditions you will be playing in.  
If you are buying it for a child, consider a entry level Tama or Pearl kit.  
If you're buying it for yourself and are an beginner/intermediate player, consider a Yamaha or Gretsch.  
If you will be playing gigs, consider a high end DW or Pearl kit.
If you will be plays primarily in a studio setting, consider a Ludwig or Sonor.
Should you buy a electronic or acoustic kit?  
It depends on what you will primarily use it for.  
An electronic kit will never be as good as an acoustic kit but will always be lighter and easier to tune.
An acoustic kit requires a space, place to strike and will never be quite as quite as a electronic kit.
At the end of the day, it is your money and you should buy what ever kit suits your needs the most.

Imagine a very large scale application that updates its data regularly. This application may have hundreds of thousands of writers updating data per second. This data needs to be reflected in the base database as well. Now in this base database you may also have readers that are looking at the data as well for analytics purposes.Now imagine a scenario in which this base database is also very large and owns tons of historical data as well. This type of database is often referred to as OLTP which means Online Transaction Processing.Now the update queries from the writer per second will update the database in the real-time with CDC. The CDC table will reflect the changes in the base database in the real- time. now the readers/analysts can do their analyses on the CDC table which is much cheaper than the original OLTP database. Also since the CDC is being updated in the real-time , the data is fresh and Chapman arena far as the base database.This is a very common scenario i imagine tons of value can be extracted from CDC

Free Cash Flow (FCFR), sometimes referred to as simply free cash flow or free cash flow to unemployment benefits from a liquidating asset is a crucial measure of financial health for a company. It is calculated as operating cash flow (OCF) minus (non-cash) capital expenditure (CAPEX).

Put simply, FCF is the money a company has left over after paying its bills (operating expenses) and investing in its future (capital expenditure). If the FCF is positive, the company is generating cash flow that can be used to pay down debt or be returned to shareholders in the form of a dividend or stock buyback. If it is negative, the company is generating a cash flow that is insufficient to meet its bill payments and will likely need to borrow money or sell assets to stay solvent.

Passover has four different names, each with a different meaning. 

It is called "Pesach" which comes from the Hebrew word for "pass over" referring to the plague of death that passed over the firstborn of Egypt during the time of the Exodus. 

It if called "Chag HaMatzot" which comes from the bread of unleavened bread eaten during the holiday to remember the Exodus.

It is called  "Zeman Shimshom" which come from the Hebrew word "14th," remembering that the Jewish people left Egypt on the 14th of the month of Nisan.

It is also called "Hag Shavuot" which comes from
the Hebrew word for "offering," remembering the sacrificial offering that the Jewish people brought along with them on their way out of Egypt.

Their calendarto is the basis for the modern day Mexican calendar, the haab' and the tzolk'in. The haab' is a calendar of 260 days, that is divided in 18 10-day periods. the tzolk'im is a calendar of 365 days,alinied in 20-day periods. 260+365=525 days, combined with ellos form a complete year. Both calendar were very accurate, as the haab' contained a 365-day astronomical year, while the tzolk'i a 260-day calendar, that included a 18-day vulnerable period, where all events could happen. A bank run occurs when all the depositors in a bank rush to withdraw their deposits at the same time. This causes a liquidity problem for the bank as it has to rise its assetts to match the depositors demands. The depositos want their money back because they perceive a risk of the bank not being able to repay all depositos, causing a contagious effect to other banks. Banks generally do not have that much liquidity to cover all the depositos at once. This is why  the central bank enters the picture and intervene to stop the contagious effect.A bank run is not good for the economy as it cuts the economy's liquidity effecting all banks an a effect on isolating part of the economy.

Freezing rain occurs when snowflakes descend into a warmer layer of air and melt completely. When these liquid water drops fall through another thin layer of freezing air just above the surface, they don't have enough time to refreeze before reaching the ground. Because they are “supercooled,” they instantly refreeze upon contact with anything that that is at or below freezing temperature (32 degrees F), and form a glaze ofake ice on the ground, cars, trees, power lines, etc. This type of precipitation is very harmful because it can cause extensive damage to supercooled droplets refreeze on contact withics trees, and cause significant damage to power lines.

When an employee works from home, the employer saves on office space and office equipment such as desks, chairs, computers, monitors etc. The employee still needs to be paid for their work but the employer saves on their overhead of running the office. This is awin-win for the employer.

However, the employee now has distractions at home such as kids, pets, phone calls and Whatsapp messages. The employee will find it harder to focus on their work and may end up spending more time on it. This increases the cost of of the employee and does not win for the employer any more.

In summary, "work from home"has an opportunity cost and the employee and employer should strike a balance in This Win-Win situation.

Braising is a common cookery technique where some primary ingredient (typically a cut of meat) is browned in some fat, typically oil, over a high heat.  Then, water is added and the mixture is then simmered until the  meat is tender.  The water absorbed during the simmering process  helps infuse the  meat with flavour from the seasonings that were added during the browning process.  Further, the addition of  liquid also helps the meat to become moister.  The end result is transformative, in that the original cut of meat, which can be rather tough, becomes  tender and delicious, as a result of the braising process.

Baseball has been referred to as America's pastime.  Although the game has gained popularity around the world, particularly in asian countries, the United States and Japan are the two countries with the most teams, making it the biggest sport in each of those countries.  Baseball has an intrinsic beauty in that it's Not a team sport like football or hockey where points are scored every minute or so.  In baseball, each team gets a turn at batting.  During their turn, they can score runs.  The opposite team is then able to do the same.  So, essentially, they are alternating between offense and defense.  This allows the fans to be engaged during both of these phases.  There are strategies involved with programming who will bat when, how many runs they will try and score, as well as defensive positions that must be covered on the field.  This makes it a thinker's game and keeps the fans engaged throughout the entire game.  Additionally, there are historic rivalries between teams and players that generate interest and excitement among the fan base. illness

Apache Kafka is a distributed system that is composed of several components. The main components of Apache Kafaka are Brokers, Zookeepers, Producers, Consumers, and Topics.
Brokers - Are the services that manage the client requests and store the data in a distributed system. 
Zookeepers - Are the services that manages the ZooKeeper servers. 
Producers - Are the servicesThat send data to the Kafka Brokers.
Consumers - Are the servicesthat retrieve data from the Kafka Brokers .
Topics - Are the containersthat hold the published data and define the consumers that can get access to it.

Multicloud enables organizations to achieve the benefits of multicloud strategies while minimizing the risks. By aggregating and analyzing data across multiple clouds, an organization can get a holistic view of their data, services and applications. This enables the organization to optimize and secure their operations. In addition, by leveraging the broad range of public cloud service providers, the organization can select the best services for each requirement. Finally, by deploying a central manage service that provides a broad range of application programming interfaces (API), the organization can easily access and manage their multiple clouds.

The Nissan GT-r was a very rare sports car produced by Nissan back in the late 80's and early 90's. Only 1999 were made and less than 500 were ever sold.  The car was never sold to the public to be driven on the roads as they were considered to be to dangerous.  Instead they were taken to a special test track in tophuku, japan and driven there to see how they would perform under the extreme conditions.  If the conditions ever got to be severe the cars were modified and upgraded to meet the new requirements.  The car had a 2.6 liter inline 6 cylinder engine that was taken from the Nissan Skyline.  This engine produced over 280 horsepower and was mated to a 5 speed manual transmission.  The body was a lightweight fiberglass body that was extremely stiff and rigid.  The suspension was a special developed by Nissan that gave the car an extremely road feel and behavior.  All of� this led to the car having one of the best handling capabilities of any production car at the time.

An Oxford comma is a comma placed immediately after the penultimate item in a series or list. For example, consider the following two different statements:

Guacamole, tomatoes, and lettuce.
Guacamole , tomatoes, and lettance.

The first is standard English punctuation. The second uses an Oxford comma to slightly modify the meaning of the statement. The first could be read as "Guacamole and tomatoes and lettuce" which implies that Guacamole and tomatos are a single unit that is alongside lettuce. Then statement can be read as "Guacomole, Bell Tomatoes, and lettuce" which imply that all three items are independent. Editors strongly prefer the second form. If you ask why, lettuce is singular and the other two are plural, the answer is that the use of of an Oxford comma implicitly makes lettuce a plural noun even though it is singular.

In the United States, daylight savings time was originally established in the US as a way to preserve fuel during World War 2. The idea was that if Americans would shift their sleeping schedules so they would be awake during daylight hours, and therefore conserving fuel during the nighttime hours. However, after World War 2 ended, Americans resumed their previous sleeping schedules. Daylight savings was then reestablished during the Energy Crisis of the 1970s. While daylight savings is still established, many states do not comply with the switch, which has caused controversy. It is also said that the switch does not save as much fuel as originally claimed.

Heterosis is the hybrid vigor of an offspring from the crossing of two different inbred parent.  The heterosis effect is the observed through crossing of genetically different inbred parents.  The heterosis effects are seen through outcrossing of parental lines to the F2 or F2 progeny.  an inbred line is a line of individuals who are all siblings or descendants from a single individual.  an outcross is the crossing of this inbred line with a unrelated inbred line.  the heterosis effect is also known as hybrid vigor.

- What does it mean to study mathematical models of strategic interactions?
Game theory studies mathematical models of strategic interactions.
- What are strategic interactions?
Strategic interactions occur when the actions/decisions of one person influence the outcomes or decisions of another person.
- What are some examples of strategic interactions?
An example of strategic interactions occurs when two persons play rock-paper-scissors. The outcomes of the game depend on the strategies of the two players. Another example of strategic interactions are negotiating a price with another person, which influences the outcomes of the negotiation. A third example of strategic interactions are voting in a democracy. The votes of person A influence the outcome of person B,100%, and vice versa.
- What are non-zero sum games?
Non-zero sum games are games in which the sum of the payouts is not always zero. An example of a non-zero sum game is the following game: player A pays player B an amount X, player B pays player C an amount Y, and player C pays player A an amount Z. In this case, X+Y+Z=0,NUMBER_ "+3" .

Braising can be done in a oven or stove top, but modern kitchens have a a stove top.  Braising can cause a caramelize or reduce the surface of the food, and develops a complex flavor.  Braising is used on tough cuts of meat, or vegetables, that need to be cooked long enough to become tender.  Braising is also a good way to extract flavor from bones,  or seasonings.

Fresh coffee beans should be used between two and ten days after roasting.  If you use them too soon, they can have an off-taste; if you use them more than ten days, they lose their flavor completely.  This is because coffee's flavor comes from oils that are extracted during the roasting process, and over time these oils migrate out of the bean's surface.  If you want to keep your coffee as fresh as possible, you should buy them in smaller quantities and use them within a couple of days.  Alternatively, you can vacuum seal them immediately after roasting to slow the rate of which oils escape from the beans.

In linguistics, transphomologization (also knowned as rephonologization or cheshitization, see below)  is a kind of sound change whereby an phonemic contrast that utilized to involve a sure feature X evolves in this sort of way that the contrast is kept, yet becomes associated with another feature Y.

To make sure that we comprehend the term as well as the concept correctly, let's consider a easy example.

English /r/ and /l/ are of contradictory nature.The two sounds are not alike in any respect. An English speaker would say that the /r/ in "carrot"is distinct from the/l/ in "college".

In transphonologization, the /r/ and / l/terminologies are involved in a contrastive pair, such as /gri/ vs. /grɛ/. Despite the fact that the two vowels are not alike, the consonants are contrastive.

English [grɛt]"surface"vs.[grekt]"grid"are transphonologized opposite one another in that the/r/ and /l /are involved in a contrastive set

A CPT is a common billing code used for services in the health care industry.  The initialism stands for Clinical Laboratory Improvements Amendments and was passed in 1988.  CPT codes are used to reflect the services rendered by a Healthcare provider.  The level of service rendered is reflected in the code along with the number of units billed.  CPT codes differ from other codes in that they are not specific to a single procedure but rather a range of services that share a common parent code.

There are several ways to prepare concrete before applying an epoxy coating. Preparation is the most important step in applying an epoxy coater. Proper preparation will ensure a long lasting bond between the concrete and the epoxy coating. This will also eliminate any bio-contamination that may exist on the surface of the concrete. This will ensure a strong bond between the concrete and epoxy. .

One method of preparing concrete is using a diamond grinder with a specific grain size. This kind of preparation is mostly done on floors. Another preparation method is using a shot-blasting technique. This is work best for larger surfaces. For smaller areas, a bristle brush with unilstmer is a good option.

Web3 or Web 3.0. is a proposed suite of internet applications and protocols that use decentralized blockchain technologies to enable trustless trustless applications. The term was coined in 2014 by Ethereum developer Gavin Wood and has gained popularity as a vision for a next-generation internet. Web3 proponents believe that current internet applications suffer from centralized points of control and lack of incentives for users to control their data. By contrast, a Web3 application would enable users to control their data and be compensated for their participation. Web3 is sometimes grouped with other emergent technologies such as cryptocurrency, Web2 (the successor to Web2.0) and the metaverse.

Remote sensing is the science (and art) of gathering information about an object or phenomenon without making physical contact with the object, in contrast to in-situ or proximal sensing. The majority of remote sensing techniques involve the reception of electromagnetic radiation, however reception of other types of energy (such as thermally and seismically transmitted data) is also considered remote sensing.

The most well know application of remote sensing is satellite based imagery in the form of visible, infrared and short-wave infrared bands. These images are used for a host of applications from weather prediction, crop health monitoring, city planning to disaster assessment and management.

1. Data Ingestion: In this stage, data from producers is ingested and processed for later use.
2. Data Processing: Once the data is ingested, it goes through a series of process to make sure the data is clean and useful for the next stage.
3. Data Storage: This is the stage where processed data is stored for later use.
4. Data Analysis: In this step, customers want to query the data for different use cases. This could be done manually or through automation like dashboards.
5. Data Visualisation: Based on the analysis done in the previous step, visualisations and reports are prepared for different audience.

Depending on how many people you're hosting and how much cooking you want to do the morning of, there are several options for a breakfast spread.

If you're hosting a big group, it's best to have some items that can be prepared ahead of time so you're not overwhelmed the morning of the event.

Pastries - either store bought or homemade, pastries are a delicious addition to any breakfast spread. Depending on your guest, you can either opt for plain pastries, or fill them with chocolate, cream or fruit. 

Eggs - Scrambled eggs are a classic addition to any breakfast. You can opt to serve them in their whole shells or chopped up. To make life easier, you can prepare the eggs ahead of time and just keep them warm in a slow cooker.

Bread - Either store bought or homemade. Opt for either a classic tange loaf, or some thing a little more elaborate like a breakfast brioche.

Fruit - Fresh cut up fruit is a great addition to any breakfast spread . Either serve it solo or mix it though yoghurt.

The leader climbs a section, then builds a belay station and then lets the follower climbs.if the follower falls, doubly woundeding both climbers, since the follower is pulling the leader from above and the leader is belaying the follower from below.

If both climbers follow the above pattern, climbs safely.

But, in reality, simul climbing is often not done with equally strong climbers. The stronger climber leads,newgear is often used to make the belay station, is less strong then the follower. Delta Live Tables separates declarative specification from execution logic so that business users can express what data they need without needing to know how it’s computed. Live Tables is also the only place where you can do both batch and streaming processing on the same data.

A personal identification number (PIN), or sometimes reducing to PIN number or PIN code, is a numeric (sometimes alpha-numeric) passphrase used in the process of authenticating a user accessing a service, either online or offline.

The PIN is typically used in conjunction with another identifier, such as an account number or user ID, to verify the user, however in some circumstances it can also be used as the sole identifier. In use offline, a PIN may be entered into a keypad, such as a numeric keypad, or scanned from a physical token, such as a barcode. In use online, a PIN is typically entered into a webform or into a specialized entry device,

The length of a PIN varies, though most are short. A PIN may be either static or dynamic. A dynamic P n is normally changed at regular intervals, such as monthly. Some systems use a challenge-response style authentication, where the user is prompted for V a paze and then their response is verified against a stored value.

For example, “this finger is hurt” means the speaker is referring to their own finger. “This pain is hurt” means the speakers is referring to something else pain they are talking about.

“That” is used to refer something that far away from the speaker, or torefer to something they are not talking about. For example,” that finger is hurt” means that the speaker is referring to someone else's finger. “That pain is hurt” means that speaker is referring to some other pain they are not talking about
